PLAINTIFF INCENTIVE FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC MOTION For Entry Of Judgt Pur To Sett- GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR# 1558

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-02-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-02-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On May-02-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Peter Liederman, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Incentive Financial Services, LLC., Plaintiff's witness: Sergio Seplovich is also present.
Ruth Auerbach, Esq. for Defendant: Marina H. Sung, also present.
Parties settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Defendant stipulated for an entry of Judgment of $16,755.19, stayed of execution as long as the defendant is timely making the monthly payment.
Payment of $2,000.00 by May 12, 2005; $3,000.00 by June 30, 2005.
There after, a monthly payment of $200.00 is due on the 20th day of each month, starting July 20, 2005 with a 10 days grace period. Last payment of $207.72 is due on April 2011.
If defendant failed to make any payment, judgment for the balance, interest, fees and costs.
Parties agreed to terms of the settlement, trial vacated and matter is placed on the CRC-225 calendar for Dismissal on Aug. 2, 2005 in Dept. 212 at 10:00 A.M.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2005 Set For Trial On May-02-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
